log: --- Chromatic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!

→ Rock: [d20:15+9=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 23 damage. Chromatic Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 44/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
